overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic Western video game showing a character walking through a dark forest at night, leading a horse with a lantern illuminating the dirt path. The scene progresses from open woodland past a distant campfire to a more enclosed trail with a stone wall.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path while leading a horse with one hand and holding a lantern in the other to illuminate the way

notable_agents.action: horse being led by reins, walking calmly behind the character with saddlebags visible

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail through the forest floor
tall trees with autumn foliage forming the forest edge
tall trees with autumn foliage forming the forest edge
dark starry sky visible through gaps in the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, with the character walking forward while leading a horse. The lantern casts a warm yellow glow on the dirt path ahead, revealing grassy terrain and deciduous trees lining both sides of the trail. The night sky is partially visible through the canopy above.

events.description: orange glow of a distant campfire becomes visible through the trees on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the distant campfire, maintaining a steady pace while leading the horse

entered.detail: distant campfire with orange flames glowing through the trees

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses along the trail, a distant campfire becomes visible through the trees on the right, adding warm orange light to the cool night scene. The trees appear closer as the path continues, and the character maintains a steady walking pace while leading the horse toward the light source.

events.description: trail becomes enclosed as a tall stone wall appears on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrowing path beside the stone wall, continuing to lead the horse forward

entered.detail: tall stone wall or rocky embankment lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes more enclosed as the character passes the campsite and a tall stone wall appears on the right side. The path narrows between the wall and the grassy left side, with the lantern light illuminating the rough stone texture. The character continues walking forward, leading the horse along this more confined section of the forest trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark forest trail that transitions from an open woodland into a more confined passage. It begins with a character leading a horse along a dirt path, where a lantern casts a warm yellow glow on the surrounding grass and deciduous trees under a partially visible night sky. As the character progresses, the cool night scene is punctuated by the appearance of a distant campfire through the trees on the right, adding a flicker of orange light to the environment. The scene then shifts as the trail becomes more enclosed, passing the campsite to reveal a tall stone wall that narrows the path. Finally, the camera follows the character forward, with the lantern light illuminating the rough texture of the stone wall as they move through the confined section of the forest.
